title: Export Filtered Results From Datilio for Your Team
summary: Datilio exports let you share the same filtered subset colleagues see in your charts.

content.summary: Datilio exports let you share the same filtered subset colleagues see in your charts.

body.text: Sharing a number without sharing the slice invites conflicting interpretations. Apply saved rules, confirm row count, export CSV compatible with Excel and slides. Name files with date and rule version for traceability.

body.alt: Business planning with documents and laptop
body.caption: Business planning with documents and laptop. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Apply saved rules, confirm row count, export CSV compatible with Excel and slides.
Name files with date and rule version for traceability.

items: Strip sensitive columns before external share.
Include filter description in filename or README.
Recipients can upload to verify independently.

body.text: Export completes upload-analyze-share with logic preserved in rule names.
Audit-friendly exports reduce back-and-forth in finance reviews.
Datilio export is the handoff point that keeps filtered context intact.
